"CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to large memory usage. This requires parsing large XMP metadata, possibly with lots of unnecessary elements.

### Patches
This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.12.1](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.12.1).

### Workarounds
If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3796](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3796).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0013, "percentile": 0.02913}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wjqc-6w8f-h24c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T13:45:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wjqc-6w8f-h24c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wjqc-6w8f-h24c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48735"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T16:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T13:45:58Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-wjqc-6w8f-h24c", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48735", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3796", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.12.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wjqc-6w8f-h24c"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-wjqc-6w8f-h24c", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Manipulated XMP metadata streams can exhaust RAM", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T13:45:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wjqc-6w8f-h24c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.12.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.12.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Manipulated XMP metadata streams can exhaust RAM
